shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "Next.js App Router Pages Router migration routes" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'rg --files app components lib pages 2>/dev/null | sort; test ! -d pages && echo '"'pages directory removed'"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- directories ---\\n' && find app components lib -type f -print | sort"
/bin/bash -lc 'find . -maxdepth 2 -type d -name pages -print; find app -type f -maxdepth 6 -print | sort'

/bin/bash -lc "rmdir pages && rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && printf '%s\\n' 'pages directory removed' && rg -n --glob '"'!node_modules/**'"' --glob '"'!.next/**'"' --glob '"'!package-lock.json'"' --glob '"'!AGENTS.md'"' \"next/(router|head|document)|getServerSideProps|getStaticProps|getStaticPaths|pages/|NextScript|<Main\" . || true && find . -maxdepth 2 -type d -name pages -print"

/bin/bash -lc "rmdir pages/api/posts pages/api pages/blog pages && rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && printf '%s\\n' 'pages directory removed' && find . -maxdepth 3 -type d -name pages -print && rg -n --glob '"'!node_modules/**'"' --glob '"'!.next/**'"' --glob '"'!package-lock.json'"' --glob '"'!AGENTS.md'"' \"next/(router|head|document)|getServerSideProps|getStaticProps|getStaticPaths|pages/|NextScript|<Main\" . || true"

/bin/bash -lc "find app components lib -type f -print | sort && printf '\\n--- source API audit ---\\n' && rg -n \"from 'next/(router|head|document)'|get(ServerSideProps|StaticProps|StaticPaths)|next/document|next/head\" app components lib || true && printf '\\n--- package scripts ---\\n' && node -e \"const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(JSON.stringify(p.scripts, null, 2))\""

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "The blog application now uses Next.js App Router exclusively. Route pages live under app/, shared document metadata and shell live in app/layout.tsx, dynamic routes use async params with generateStaticParams, generateMetadata, revalidate, and notFound, API endpoints use typed route.ts handlers with Request/NextResponse, and client-only navigation/context code is isolated in client components. The source pages/ directory was removed." -t "App Router migration standard" --unit-type decision -l "nextjs" -s codex -i 0.8'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
